Lightning Funded Accounts
Skip the evaluation process and start earning immediately with Straight to Sim Funded accounts.

April 7, 2026

Table of contents

A "Lightning Funded" account allows traders to skip the typical evaluation phases and begin trading simulated funds immediately. This gives Tradeify traders direct access to a simulated funded account with the potential to start earning profits towards their payout from day one.

Tradeify offers Lightning Funded account sizes of $25k, $50k, $100k & $150k. The rules for the Lightning Funded are stated in the table below:

Current Position Limits (September 2025+)

Account Size

Trading Days to Payout

Daily Loss Limit (Soft Breach)

Trailing Max Drawdown

Max Position Size

None

Please note: the Daily Loss Limit for 150k Lightning funded purchases made before March 31st is $3,750.

⚠️ Important: Accounts purchased before the new dashboard launch retain their original parameters, including on reset.

Instant Payouts: Lightning Funded traders can now instantly request payouts directly from the dashboard once the consistency rule and profit objective are met.

Legacy Position Limits (Pre-September 2025)

The following limits apply ONLY to accounts purchased before September 12, 2025 at 8:00 AM EST. Most accounts use the current limits above.

Account Size

Legacy Position Size

50k

5 Contracts (50 Micros)

100k

10 Contracts (100 Micros)

150k

15 Contracts (150 Micros)

Legacy 150K Risk Parameters (Pre-Dashboard Launch)

150K Lightning Funded accounts purchased before the new dashboard launch retain the following risk parameters, including on reset:

Account Size

Daily Loss Limit (Soft Breach)

Trailing Max Drawdown

$150k

$3,750

$6,000

For complete profit targets to achieve payouts on these accounts see here.

Lightning Funded Accounts use an End of Day Trailing Max Drawdown, which is calculated and based on the account balance at the end of the trading day.

For more information on this type of drawdown, see our full article here.

This offers more flexibility during the trading day. Intraday fluctuations won’t affect the drawdown level, allowing you to hold positions with less risk of hitting the drawdown limit due to temporary losses.

For these accounts, we've implemented a progressive Consistency Rule that starts at 20% for your first payout and gradually increases to ensure sustained performance. This graduated approach helps us identify traders committed to long-term success and continuous improvement, rather than those relying on short-term, high-risk strategies. As you advance through multiple payouts, the increasing consistency requirements demonstrate your ability to maintain steady and reliable performance over time.

By maintaining consistent trading habits, traders can better manage risk and achieve sustainable growth—aligning with our goal of fostering a stable and profitable trading environment

Frequently Asked Questions

Q: What is the maximum position size for my 50K Lightning account?

A: For accounts purchased after September 12, 2025: 4 mini contracts OR 40 micro contracts. Legacy accounts purchased before that date have 5 minis / 50 micros.

Q: Can I hold both mini and micro contracts at the same time?

A: No. You must choose either minis OR micros - you cannot hold both contract types simultaneously. See our Hedging & Contract Mixing Rules for details.
